name: Thinker Agricultural Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Thinker Agricultural Machinery Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, sale, and service of agricultural machinery in China. Its products include grain harvesting, grain crop harvesting, tillage, arable land power, and forage harvesting machinery. The company also exports its products to Indonesia, Vietnam, Sri Lanka, Iran, Peru, El Salvador, Ecuador, Myanmar, South Korea, the Philippines, North Korea, South Africa, and internationally. Thinker Agricultural Machinery Co., Ltd. was founded in 2004 and is based in Huzhou, China.
